title: Edge Case - Verify behavior with no internet connection on OTP verification
description: Tests how the app handles OTP submission when the device is offline.
preconditions: User is on the OTP screen.

steps.description: 1. Enter a valid phone number and navigate to the OTP screen.
2. Disable Wi-Fi and mobile data on the device.

expected_result: A user-friendly error message like 'No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.' is displayed. The user remains on the OTP screen.
